title: Striking off or dissolving a limited company
body: "This guidance explains how a company can be removed from the Companies House register, known as ‘striking off’ or ‘dissolving’. This is covered under law in part 31 of the Companies Act 2006.  This guidance does not cover unusual or complex circumstances, or circumstances when a company is dissolved after formal insolvency proceedings. If you’re not sure about your responsibilities after reading this guidance, you may wish to seek professional advice. "

taxons.title: Company closure, administration, liquidation and insolvency
